text: I am surrounded by glass, light, and an aura of organized modernity. The reflective surfaces and angular lines ignite thoughts about transparency and boundary—how much we see, and how much remains hidden. Moving into the next space, the atmosphere bathes me in color and concept, with the bold typography and digital displays drawing my attention toward innovation and collective efforts. Here, curiosity stirs within me, mingling with a sense of belonging to something larger than myself. I feel engaged, both as an observer and a participant in a living, evolving narrative of discovery.
